text:
we do silly impulse things

"QUAK" https://mombotro.itch.io/quak About a month ago, as I was watching my daily perusal of baby chicken, duck, and turkey videos, I chanced upon one where the cameraperson had their other hand placed firmly at the bottom of the screen like it was an FPS. My wife pointed this out, saying it would make for a fun game concept. I immediately thought of DOOM. Name? Quake? Nah. QUAK. Now we HAD to do it. My wife is incredible. She got to work right away using Claude Code to come up with basic gameplay in Godot engine. I playtested the builds. She added sprites and artwork. I contributed voiceover. She got the sound effects from somewhere. My face inspired the one you see at the bottom-center of the screen. Lots of touch-ups and bug fixes later, QUAK is released and ready to play!
html:
we do silly impulse things

"QUAK"

https://mombotro.itch.io/quak

About a month ago, as I was watching my daily perusal of baby chicken, duck, and turkey videos, I chanced upon one where the cameraperson had their other hand placed firmly at the bottom of the screen like it was an FPS. My wife pointed this out, saying it would make for a fun game concept. I immediately thought of DOOM. Name? Quake? Nah. QUAK. Now we HAD to do it.

My wife is incredible. She got to work right away using Claude Code to come up with basic gameplay in Godot engine. I playtested the builds. She added sprites and artwork. I contributed voiceover. She got the sound effects from somewhere. My face inspired the one you see at the bottom-center of the screen. Lots of touch-ups and bug fixes later, QUAK is released and ready to play!
